creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
Old port was using the LIBZ distributed with hylafax. FreeBSD
	has libz.* of its own for a while...

	Also, the new port does not require GNU-make and tries to obey
	local settings for CC, CXX, CFLAGS, and CXXFLAGS.

Fix: 

The new port is in the
    ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/hylafax-4.0.2-improved.tar.gz
